analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov claims Latvia and Estonia discriminate against Russian-speaking residents, calling statelessness shameful and depriving them of democratic rights. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) – Yes. Latvia and Estonia, Western allies, are portrayed as violating rights and engaging in discriminatory, undemocratic practices against Russians, fitting the depiction of Western-aligned actors as hostile/immoral to Russians. RU2 – No mention of alternative systems or multipolar cooperation. RU3 – No framing of Russia as a benevolent partner or mediator. RU4 – No historical glorification. RU5 – No showcase of current Russian achievements. RU6 – No cultural/nature content. Conclusion: Only RU1 applies.
